visual.photography: Soft lifestyle photography, spa textures, natural elements, mindful moments
visual.lighting_default: Soft diffused light, warm whites, gentle shadows, candlelit ambience
visual.style: Tranquil, mindful, soft-spoken luxury, nature-inspired serenity

voice.language_mix: English 80% + Bahasa Malaysia 20%, gentle and unhurried

audience.primary: Urban professionals 28-50, stress-relief seekers, self-care enthusiasts
personas: Burnt-out professional seeking meaningful relaxation rituals
Mindfulness practitioner building a home sanctuary
Self-care enthusiast who values quality over quantity
Gift buyer seeking thoughtful, calming wellness gifts

motion_language.name: Still Waters
motion_language.vibe: Deep calm, like a forest lake at dawn
motion_language.audio: Water droplets, candle flicker crackle, deep breath sounds, ambient nature, distant birdsong
motion_language.motion: Single water drop ripple in slow-mo, candle flame gentle sway, bath salt dissolving, steam curling upward from essential oil diffuser
motion_language.language: Whispered calm — every frame invites a deep breath, every sound slows the heartbeat
motion_language.mood: Serene, meditative, deeply calming, gently luxurious

tiktok.camera_movement: Slow macro on water droplet, gentle pan across candlelit setup, soft focus breathing cue
tiktok.typical_use: ASMR relaxation clips, bedtime routine rituals, calming visual loops

instagram.stories: Guided breathing moments, product ritual step-by-step, soft ambient mood boards
instagram.feed_carousel: 9:16 portrait images, soft sage and blush tones, mindful flat lays with natural elements
instagram.reels_carousel: 9:16 portrait motion clips, candle-lighting rituals, bath preparation sequences

youtube_shorts.camera_movement: Slow drift across spa setup, macro on dissolving bath salts, candlelight to wide reveal
youtube_shorts.typical_use: Evening wind-down rituals, meditation space setup, sensory ASMR content
